title: Two-stage auth + account session — full rework (Stage 1 persists in localStorage; Stage 2 per-session vault unlock; vault picker; two-stage onboarding; sidebar section groups)
preconditions: User visits IronVault.app from a browser without an active account session
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Visit ironvault.app — see landing page (Tier 1: no account session). 2. Click Log In → Stage 1 email + account password form. 3. Submit → account session saved to localStorage. 4. Vault picker shown (Tier 2: account logged in no vault session). 5. Enter vault master password → Dashboard. 6. Reload page → vault picker shown (account session persists); vault session must be re-entered. 7. Sign up: Stage 1 form (email/name/plan/account password) → redirect to /auth/create-vault → Stage 2 (vault name + master password) → Dashboard.
expected_result: Stage 1 (email login) persists across visits; Stage 2 (vault master password) per-session; vault picker lists all local vaults each with own master password; cloud vault placeholder visible; sidebar grouped into Vault and Finance sections with labels; two-stage onboarding (signup → create-vault) works; account logout returns to landing
actual_result: BUG-011/012 implementation stored credentials but did not persist account session — every page reload showed Stage 1 again. No vault picker page. Signup created both account and vault in one step. Login page handled both stages internally. Sidebar ungrouped.
status: account-auth.ts: added saveAccountSession/isAccountSessionActive/getAccountSessionEmail/clearAccountSession. auth-context.tsx: added isAccountLoggedIn + accountEmail state + accountLogin() + accountLogout(). App.tsx: three-tier routing (Tier1=no account session→landing+auth; Tier2=account logged in+vault locked→vault picker+create-vault; Tier3=vault unlocked→main app). NEW vault-picker.tsx: account home listing all local vaults with per-vault master password unlock + biometric shortcut + cloud placeholder + create-vault CTA. NEW create-vault.tsx: Stage 2 vault creation (name + master password). signup.tsx: Stage 1 only (no vault fields); redirects to /auth/create-vault after account creation. login.tsx: Stage 1 only (email + account password). Sidebar: coreNavItems (Vault) + financeNavItems (Finance) groups with section headers.
fix_commit_or_change: PASS — 81/81 e2e tests pass (8 new BUG-014 scenarios covering session persistence/vault picker/two-stage onboarding/logout/signup/sidebar labels/web-cached-visit)
retest_status: NO REGRESSION — all 73 prior tests still pass + 8 new tests pass (81 total)

title: Vault picker cross-account leakage + dropdown UX broken after account login
preconditions: User logs into Account A then Account B (or reloads after switching accounts)
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Log into Account A (create vault). 2. Log out. 3. Log into Account B. 4. Vault picker shows Account A vaults. Also: vault selector dropdown renders null/broken on initial vault-picker load.
expected_result: Each account sees ONLY its own vaults in vault picker and selector dropdown. Dropdown renders and opens correctly.
actual_result: Account A vaults visible to Account B session. Vault selector dropdown returns null (activeVault null) when stale active-vault localStorage key points to another account vault ID. VaultSelector component returns null when activeVault is null.
suspected_root_cause: vault-manager.ts used global ironvault_registry and ironvault_active_vault keys shared across all accounts. activeVaultId in memory cached a stale ID from a prior account. VaultSelectionContext did not reload when accountEmail changed.
fix_commit_or_change: vault-manager.ts: email-scoped localStorage keys (ironvault_registry_<suffix> / ironvault_active_vault_<suffix>); setAccountEmail() with one-time legacy migration; clearAccountEmail() on logout; getActiveVaultId() stale-pointer guard. auth-context.tsx: vaultManager.setAccountEmail() on initializeAuth + accountLogin; clearAccountEmail + clearInternalState on logout. vault-selection-context.tsx: added accountEmail dep to loadVaults effect so vault list reloads on account switch. vault-picker.tsx: accountEmail dep on cloud-vault loading effect. tests/e2e/full-sweep.spec.ts: section 17 (5 tests) — fresh-account empty state + 1-vault + cross-account isolation + dropdown + logout-login isolation. unlockVault helper fixed to check scoped registry key. test 17.3 save/restore registry pattern.
retest_status: PASS — 208/208 e2e pass (10 new section-17 tests on desktop + mobile)
regression_status: NO REGRESSION — all 188 prior tests still pass

title: Vault switcher dropdown hidden behind page content (z-index / overflow clipping) — REOPENED: createPortal fix still clipped by html/body overflow:hidden
preconditions: User has ≥1 vault, navigates to any authenticated page on desktop or mobile
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Log in. 2. On desktop: click vault name button in header → dropdown does not appear or appears behind content. 3. On mobile: tap vault chip → dropdown clipped by header overflow.
expected_result: Vault switcher dropdown appears above all content on both desktop and mobile.
actual_result: Desktop: dropdown (z-50 absolute) inside sticky+backdrop-blur header (stacking context) renders below cards with transform. Mobile: overflow-hidden on fixed header clips the absolute dropdown child entirely. First fix (createPortal) still clipped because html/body/#root have overflow-y:hidden globally set by index.css — position:fixed elements are still clipped when overflow:hidden is on html element.
suspected_root_cause: App.tsx createPortal fix (attempt 1) escaped stacking contexts but NOT html/body overflow:hidden. index.css sets overflow-y:hidden on html/body/#root for vault app managed scroll. The correct fix is Radix DropdownMenu which uses its own internal Portal (DropdownMenuPrimitive.Portal) — Radix portals are genuinely immune because they use React portals + position:fixed with their own z-index management separate from overflow clipping.
fix_commit_or_change: App.tsx: replaced createPortal custom dropdown with Radix DropdownMenu/DropdownMenuContent/DropdownMenuItem/DropdownMenuSeparator/DropdownMenuTrigger. Mobile header left side changed to min-w-0 flex-1 overflow-hidden (fix for BUG-018 combined). Desktop header also uses Radix DropdownMenu. Removed all useRef/state/handler code for custom portal approach. Radix DropdownMenuContent renders to document.body via internal Radix portal — bypasses all ancestor overflow and stacking constraints.
notes: 2026-04-07 Reopened — createPortal approach insufficient. Radix DropdownMenu applied.

title: Hamburger/More menu not scrollable — Settings and Profile clipped at bottom
preconditions: Vault unlocked on mobile, user opens hamburger/More menu
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open app on mobile. 2. Tap hamburger/More menu. 3. Observe Settings and Profile items at bottom.
expected_result: All menu items scrollable and reachable including Settings and Profile at bottom.
actual_result: Settings and Profile items clipped below viewport — user cannot tap them. Menu has no scroll.

title: App auto-navigates to Dashboard every ~1 minute + screen flickering (auto-lock grace period = 0)
preconditions: Vault unlocked, user navigates away from Dashboard
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Unlock vault. 2. Navigate to any page. 3. Wait ~1 minute or let screen dim. 4. Observe.
expected_result: App stays on current page. No uninstructed navigation. No flicker.
actual_result: App navigates back to Dashboard roughly every minute. Screen flickers. On mobile: screen dim → app redirects to vault picker → unlock → setLocation('/') = Dashboard repeatedly.
suspected_root_cause: auto-lock.ts had gracePeriodMs:0 (default). Web visibilitychange handler triggered immediate vault lock when tab hidden (even on screen dim). Lock → vault picker shown → unlock → setLocation('/') = Dashboard. Every screen dim = full cycle. Idle timer also 5 min was secondary.
fix_commit_or_change: auto-lock.ts: gracePeriodMs default changed from 0 → 30*1000 (30s). loadSettings() default changed from 0 → 30*1000. Web visibilitychange handler: removed immediate-lock path for gracePeriodMs===0 (web never locks immediately on hide). On tab visible: resetIdleTimer() called. Lock only triggered on tab show when hidden-time ≥ gracePeriodMs.

title: Plan-gated features not checked from server — stale client cache could grant/deny features incorrectly
preconditions: User's plan changes in admin console
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Admin downgrades user from Pro to Free. 2. User continues using app. 3. Cloud sync / extra vaults still accessible until page reload.
expected_result: Frontend reflects plan change within 5 minutes (cache TTL). usePlanFeatures() hook used everywhere a feature is conditionally enabled.
actual_result: Plan gating was based purely on client-side license context with no server refetch. Admin plan changes do not propagate to frontend within any reasonable time.
suspected_root_cause: No usePlanFeatures() hook existed. Plan data was cached indefinitely in LicenseContext. No server-side entitlement refetch triggered.
fix_commit_or_change: NEW client/src/hooks/use-plan-features.ts: usePlanFeatures() hook fetches /api/crm/entitlement/:email on mount; caches result in localStorage (iv_plan_cache) with 5-min TTL; returns PlanFeatures object with localVaultLimit/cloudSyncEnabled/bankImportEnabled/analyticsEnabled/biometricEnabled/isPaid/isLifetime. savePlanCache() and clearPlanCache() exported for use in auth flows. create-vault.tsx + vault-picker.tsx use usePlanFeatures() for vault count gating. server/routes.ts: /api/crm/entitlement/:userId now accepts email (resolves via getCrmUserByEmail) + returns top-level plan field so hook data.plan read is correct.
retest_status: VERIFIED — email lookup + response shape fixed in routes.ts

title: React hooks violation — pro-gated pages broken for ALL users after UpgradeGate conditional return
preconditions: Any user navigates to expenses/subscriptions/api-keys/bank-statements/documents/goals/investments
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /expenses, /subscriptions, /api-keys, /bank-statements, /documents, /goals, /investments. 2. Click any button on these pages.
expected_result: All buttons work correctly on all 7 pro-gated pages for both free and pro users.
actual_result: Buttons on all 7 pages completely non-functional. Clicking Add/Edit/Delete does nothing. Pages appear to render but have no working interactions.
suspected_root_cause: React Rules of Hooks violation: hooks called after conditional early return `if (!isFeatureAvailable(...)) return <UpgradeGate>`. When isFeatureAvailable flips between renders, hook call order changes → broken state for ALL users (not just free).
fix_commit_or_change: expenses.tsx/subscriptions.tsx/api-keys.tsx/bank-statements.tsx/documents.tsx/goals.tsx/investments.tsx: Moved ALL hooks to top of component before any conditional return. Added licenseLoading from useSubscription(). Moved UpgradeGate guard to just before the main JSX return (`if (!licenseLoading && !isFeatureAvailable('X')) return <UpgradeGate/>`). Added isLoading to useSubscription() return value.

title: Entitlement API response shape mismatch — server plan never synced to client license
preconditions: Pro user loads the app
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Log in as pro user. 2. Open /expenses. 3. Check if UpgradeGate shows.
expected_result: Pro user sees pro page content without UpgradeGate.
actual_result: Pro user sees UpgradeGate on all pro-gated pages. Server plan never applied to client license state.
suspected_root_cause: getEntitlementStatus() reads `data.entitlement.plan` but API returned flat `{plan,status}`. data.entitlement was always undefined → if (!entitlement?.plan) return short-circuited → pro plan never synced.
fix_commit_or_change: api/index.ts: /api/crm/entitlement/:id now returns both flat fields AND nested wrapper: `{ plan, status, ..., entitlement: { plan, status, ... } }`. Both the not-found case (free default) and the found case include the entitlement wrapper.

title: Pro license reads as free after vault unlock — LicenseProvider mounts with locked vault
preconditions: Pro user loads app (vault locked) and unlocks vault
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Load app fresh (vault locked state). 2. Unlock vault. 3. Navigate to /expenses or any pro feature.
expected_result: Pro user sees pro page content after vault unlock.
actual_result: Pro user sees UpgradeGate even after unlocking vault. License reads as free for entire session.
suspected_root_cause: LicenseProvider mounts when vault is LOCKED → vaultStorage.getPersistentData('license') can't decrypt → returns null → free default. No hook triggered license reload after vault unlock.
fix_commit_or_change: client/src/contexts/license-context.tsx: Added `useAuth()` import. Added `useEffect([isUnlocked])` that fires when vault unlocks: resets hasSyncedFromServer.current=false, calls loadLicense().then(syncFromServer) — loads the now-decryptable license from IndexedDB and re-syncs with the server entitlement API.

title: Notes CRUD buttons invisible on mobile — opacity-0 with no hover-none media query override
preconditions: Vault unlocked on mobile, user views notes list
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open /notes on mobile. 2. Observe note cards. 3. Try to find edit/pin/delete buttons.
expected_result: Edit, pin, delete buttons visible on mobile note cards.
actual_result: Buttons wrapper has `opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100` — CSS hover state never triggers on touch devices. Buttons are invisible and untappable on mobile.
suspected_root_cause: Tailwind `group-hover:` modifier only fires on pointer-hover events. Touch devices do not fire hover — buttons remain at opacity-0 permanently on mobile.
fix_commit_or_change: notes.tsx: added `[@media(hover:none)]:opacity-100` to the button wrapper div className. Buttons are now always visible on touch devices (where hover is unavailable) while remaining hover-triggered on desktop.

title: Settings Clear Data uses window.confirm() — blocked in certain browsers and inaccessible
preconditions: User navigates to /settings and clicks Clear All Data
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open /settings. 2. Scroll to Data Management. 3. Click Clear All Data button.
expected_result: React confirmation dialog with Cancel and destructive confirm button.
actual_result: window.confirm() dialog appears — blocked in some embedded contexts and inaccessible for screen readers.
suspected_root_cause: Settings page used window.confirm() for irreversible data clear action. This pattern is blocked in iframes, Tauri webviews, and some mobile browsers.
fix_commit_or_change: settings.tsx: added showClearDataDialog state. handleClearData now calls setShowClearDataDialog(true) instead of window.confirm(). New handleClearDataConfirmed() does the actual data clearing. New JSX Dialog with data-testid=dialog-clear-data and data-testid=button-confirm-clear-data.

title: Notes delete uses window.confirm() — blocked in restricted contexts + no CDP automation support
preconditions: User views /notes and tries to delete a note
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open /notes. 2. Click delete button on a note. 3. Observe confirmation behavior.
expected_result: React confirmation dialog with Cancel and destructive confirm button.
actual_result: window.confirm() blocks CDP/Playwright automation and is inaccessible in embedded contexts.
suspected_root_cause: notes.tsx handleDeleteNote() used if(!confirm(...)) return pattern — same as BUG-030/032 but discovered later during manual QA pass.
fix_commit_or_change: notes.tsx: added deleteNoteTarget state. handleDeleteNote sets target; handleDeleteNoteConfirmed does the actual delete. Dialog with data-testid=dialog-delete-note and data-testid=button-confirm-delete-note. Pattern matches BUG-030/032.

title: Reminders delete uses window.confirm() — blocked in restricted contexts + no CDP automation support
preconditions: User views /reminders and tries to delete a reminder
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open /reminders. 2. Click delete button on a reminder. 3. Observe confirmation behavior.
expected_result: React confirmation dialog with Cancel and destructive confirm button.
actual_result: window.confirm() blocks CDP/Playwright automation and is inaccessible in embedded contexts.
suspected_root_cause: reminders.tsx handleDelete() used direct deleteReminder() call with no confirmation — and earlier version used window.confirm(). Discovered during manual QA pass session 016.
fix_commit_or_change: reminders.tsx: added deleteReminderTarget state. handleDelete sets target; handleDeleteReminderConfirmed does the actual delete. Dialog with data-testid=dialog-delete-reminder and data-testid=button-confirm-delete-reminder. Pattern matches BUG-030/031.

title: Cross-device login fails — account credentials stored only in localStorage (not server-backed)
preconditions: User has signed up on one browser/device
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Sign up on Browser A 2. Open incognito/new device 3. Go to /auth/login 4. Enter same email + password
expected_result: Login succeeds and vault picker appears
actual_result: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
suspected_root_cause: saveAccountCredentials() writes only to localStorage. verifyAccountCredentials() reads only from localStorage. No server call on signup or login. New browser has empty localStorage.
fix_commit_or_change: d521182: auth-context.tsx accountLogin() now calls POST /api/auth/token (trust-on-first-use) as primary check; falls back to localStorage on network error. initializeAuth() syncs stored hash to server in background on session restore.
retest_status: PASS — /api/auth/token endpoint confirmed live on www.ironvault.app (returns 401 for bad hash; 200 for correct hash). Deployed via ironvault-main production deploy 2026-04-09.
notes: Deployed to ironvault-main (www.ironvault.app) 2026-04-09. BUG-034 (signups not in admin) fixed separately.

title: Real signups not appearing in admin console — admin reads wrong DB table
preconditions: New user signs up on www.ironvault.app
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Sign up fresh email on www.ironvault.app 2. Open admin.ironvault.app/customers within 10s 3. Observe customer list
expected_result: New signup appears in customer list within 10 seconds
actual_result: New signup never appears — customer list shows only seeded test data
suspected_root_cause: Admin console api/index.ts queried a customers table that does not exist in the Neon DB. Main backend writes to crm_users + entitlements tables. Wrong table reference was never caught because vercel.json was routing to server-simple-working.ts (JSON file storage) not api/index.ts.
fix_commit_or_change: Three-part fix: (1) api/index.ts rewritten — all customer queries use crm_users LEFT JOIN entitlements. (2) vercel.json routing changed from /backend/server-simple-working.ts to /api/index. (3) pg + @vercel/node added to root package.json so api/index.ts can import them. Deployed 2026-04-09.
retest_status: PASS — curl https://admin.ironvault.app/api/customers returns 9 real users including saketsuman1312@gmail.com
notes: P0 production blocker. Fixed and deployed 2026-04-09. admin.ironvault.app now shows all real signups from crm_users.

title: Cloud sync missing 60s pull poll — Browser B never receives live edits from Browser A
preconditions: Both devices logged in with same account; vault cloud-synced
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open vault on Browser A 2. Add a password 3. Wait 60s on Browser B
expected_result: New password appears on Browser B within 60s
actual_result: Browser B never updates — no pull poll existed
suspected_root_cause: useCloudAutoSync only pushed; no setInterval to poll GET /api/vaults/cloud and compare serverUpdatedAt
fix_commit_or_change: use-cloud-auto-sync.ts: added 60s setInterval that GETs listCloudVaults() compares serverUpdatedAt vs iv_last_pull_{id} downloads + replaceVaultFromBlob + dispatches vault:cloud:replaced; storage.ts: added replaceVaultFromBlob(); vault-context.tsx: listens for vault:cloud:replaced → refreshData()
retest_status: PASS — logic correct; full live test requires two browsers
notes: BUG-037 note: cap sync android clean; Gradle build untestable (no JVM on host)

title: CRUD persistence broken — items saved but disappear on refresh / cloud pull overwrites optimistic state
preconditions: Vault unlocked with cloud sync enabled
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Add a password/note/subscription 2. See success toast 3. Refresh page or wait 3s
expected_result: Item persists
actual_result: Item disappears on next page refresh or 3s after save
suspected_root_cause: Three root causes: (1) exportVault→saveBackupMetadata→savePersistentData→encryptAndStore('persistent_data') dispatched vault:item:saved → triggered debounced push loop at 3s intervals. (2) doPull() fired on every route navigation (MainLayout remounts via inline arrow component in Route) and overrode optimistic state during 3s push debounce window. (3) deleteBankStatement/deleteBankTransaction/deleteInvestment/deleteInvestmentGoal called store.delete() on wrong (empty) named stores instead of encrypted_data.
fix_commit_or_change: storage.ts: skip vault:item:saved dispatch for persistent_data store writes; fix delete methods to target encrypted_data store. use-cloud-auto-sync.ts: pushPendingRef guard at 3 async points in doPull; update lastPull after successful push. App.tsx: update lastPull after heal push on unlock.
retest_status: VERIFIED — bundle index-06bc429f.js deployed; all 16 CRUD modules manually tested
notes: Deployed to ironvault-main (www.ironvault.app) 2026-04-15.

title: Android text overlapping in dialogs — max-h-[Nvh] clips content behind Android nav bar
preconditions: Vault unlocked; any dialog with max-h-[Nvh] class
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open any dialog (Import, Add Password, etc.) on Android 2. Observe dialog height
expected_result: Dialog content fully visible and scrollable
actual_result: Dialog content clipped or overlapping behind Android system bars
suspected_root_cause: Regular vh units include Android system bar height, not actual visible viewport. Should use svh (small viewport height) which excludes system bars.
fix_commit_or_change: sed bulk-replaced all max-h-[Nvh] → max-h-[Nsvh] in client/src/**/*.tsx (20+ components). Also fixed max-height: 90vh !important in mobile-fixes.css → 90svh.
notes: Depends on BUG-046 (edge-to-edge) for env(safe-area-inset-*) to be populated correctly.

(3) Removed FeaturesSection/SecuritySection/PricingSection/FAQSection from LandingPage render. (4) Added compact QuickLinksGrid (6 category icons linking to /features). Created client/src/pages/info/faq.tsx + registered /faq route in App.tsx.

title: Multi-vault switch security — switchVault() changes active vault without password verification

expected_result: Master password dialog appears before switching
actual_result: Vault switches instantly with no password prompt — Vault B data readable without authentication

fix_commit_or_change: vault-selection-context.tsx: added requestVaultSwitch(vaultId) function and password dialog rendered inside Provider. Dialog verifies password via auth.login(password) before completing switch; reverts on failure. All 4 call sites (vault-selector.tsx, App.tsx mobile header, App.tsx desktop header, vault-manager-ui.tsx) updated to use requestVaultSwitch.

title: Profile section not opening on Android Capacitor app
preconditions: Android app running without edge-to-edge
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Tap More in bottom navigation 2. Scroll to Profile 3. Tap Profile
expected_result: Profile page opens
actual_result: Nothing happens or Profile inaccessible
suspected_root_cause: Root cause: Android nav bar overlapped bottom tabs (no edge-to-edge → env(safe-area-inset-bottom)=0 → BottomTabs had no bottom padding → More button tappable area behind nav bar). MoreSheet content also clipped at bottom.
fix_commit_or_change: Resolved by BUG-046 (edge-to-edge). MainActivity.java: WindowCompat.setDecorFitsSystemWindows(false). styles.xml: transparent status/nav bar. After fix, env(safe-area-inset-bottom) non-zero → BottomTabs pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] pads correctly.
notes: Root cause was BUG-046 (edge-to-edge not enabled). Fix is in the same APK.

title: Android Capacitor app not full-screen — safe areas / Dynamic Island not respected
preconditions: Android device with system bars
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open Android app 2. Observe status bar and nav bar areas
expected_result: App extends to full screen with safe area padding
actual_result: App does not extend behind system bars; env(safe-area-inset-*) CSS vars return 0 → no padding applied
suspected_root_cause: WindowCompat.setDecorFitsSystemWindows() not called → system UI not edge-to-edge → WebView doesn't fill full screen → CSS env(safe-area-inset-*) always 0
fix_commit_or_change: MainActivity.java: added WindowCompat.setDecorFitsSystemWindows(getWindow(), false) + import androidx.core.view.WindowCompat. styles.xml AppTheme.NoActionBar: added android:statusBarColor=transparent + android:navigationBarColor=transparent + android:windowDrawsSystemBarBackgrounds=true + android:windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode=shortEdges.
notes: Enables env(safe-area-inset-*) CSS vars on Android. Fixes BUG-045 (Profile) and BUG-042 (dialog overflow) as a dependency.

title: Investment form save fails silently — console error: Encryption key not set
reproducibility: Always on /investments page after SPA navigation
preconditions: Vault unlocked; navigate to /investments via SPA
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Unlock vault 2. SPA-navigate to /investments 3. Click Add Investment 4. Fill all required fields (Name, Type FD, Institution, Amount, Date) 5. Click Add Investment submit
expected_result: Investment saved; success toast displayed
actual_result: Form stays open with no feedback. No success toast. Console shows: [ERROR] Failed to load license: Error: Encryption key not set at getPersistentData
suspected_root_cause: Race condition: license-context initial mount useEffect calls getPersistentData() before vault encryption key available. isLoading stays true. Second useEffect already had isUnlocked guard for correct post-unlock load.
fix_commit_or_change: license-context.tsx: initial mount useEffect now skips getPersistentData() if vault is locked (!isUnlocked) and sets isLoading=false immediately. Post-unlock useEffect (already had isUnlocked guard) handles the real load. Eliminates console errors and hang.
